meta.title: ArcanaAI - Mystical Guidance & Insights
meta.description: Get AI-powered tarot readings with mystical wisdom for your questions and spiritual guidance

page.shufflingCards: Shuffling the deck and drawing your cards…

streak.inactive: {{count}}-day streak — pull a card today to keep it

hero.v0_sub: Three cards rest beneath your fingers — let one speak before you choose.
hero.v1_sub: The crescent grows and the hour is quiet — a gentle window for clarity.
hero.v2_title: What do you wish to remember, {{name}}?
hero.v2_sub: Your story is written in symbols. We're only here to read it back to you.
hero.v3_title: Good {{partOfDay}}, {{name}}. The cards have been waiting.
hero.v3_sub: Pick up where the last reading left off, or draw one fresh from the deck.
hero.v4_title: Step closer to the edge of the page, {{name}}.
hero.v4_sub: Tonight the deck remembers what the day forgot. Ask it carefully.
hero.v5_sub: Some questions take more than one lifetime to answer.
hero.v6_sub: The cards notice these things before people do.
hero.v7_title: There's a quiet ache in the air, {{name}}.
hero.v7_sub: Let the deck hold it for a moment.
hero.v8_sub: You felt it before you opened this page.
hero.v9_title: Not every coincidence is an accident, {{name}}.
hero.v9_sub: Tonight may reveal which ones matter.
hero.v10_title: The next chapter presses gently at the door.
hero.v10_sub: A single card may be enough to open it.
hero.v11_title: The candles are lit. The deck is awake.
hero.v11_sub: All that remains is your question.
hero.v12_title: A reading begins long before the first card is drawn.
hero.v12_sub: Sometimes it begins with the feeling that brought you here.
hero.v14_title: The stars are quieter than usual tonight.
hero.v14_sub: That often means the cards will speak louder.
hero.v15_title: Moonlight and memory make dangerous companions.
hero.v15_sub: Still… they tend to reveal the truth.
hero.v16_title: Between sleep and waking, the symbols grow clearer.
hero.v16_sub: You arrived at exactly the right hour.
hero.v17_title: You don't need to have the right words today.
hero.v18_sub: Insight arrives more easily when the world grows quiet.
hero.v19_title: Some answers are meant to comfort, not control.
hero.v20_title: The deck remembered you before you arrived.
hero.v21_title: A strange current follows this evening.
hero.v22_title: Not every card wants to be turned over.
hero.v22_sub: But the important ones usually insist.
hero.v23_sub: Patterns emerge slowly. Tonight may connect a missing thread.
hero.v24_title: Your last reading still lingers in the air.
hero.v24_sub_with_echo: The echo of "{{lastReading}}" has not fully faded.
hero.v24_sub_without: Some symbols take time to unfold.
hero.v25_title_ready: The deck is ready for you, {{name}}.
hero.v25_sub_ready: Trust the first instinct. It usually arrives before doubt.
hero.v25_sub_settling: Even silence can be part of the reading.
hero.v26_sub: Fortunately, the tarot compensates for it.
hero.v27_title: Another night, another attempt to negotiate with fate.
hero.v27_sub: At least this time you brought cards.
hero.v28_sub: You may or may not enjoy hearing them.
hero.v29_title: Every soul leaves annotations in the margins.
hero.v29_sub: Tonight we read a few of yours.
hero.v30_title: Some stories are too honest to be spoken aloud.
hero.v31_title: You stand between memory and possibility, {{name}}.
hero.v31_sub: The cards were made for thresholds like this.

sessions.noReadings: No readings yet — your journey begins with a single card.

spreads.oneCardDesc: A quick whisper for the moment.
spreads.horseshoeDesc: Seven cards to map a decision.
spreads.bringQuestion: Bring a single question to mind. We'll keep the rest of the world quiet while you draw.

onboarding.title: Welcome to ArcanaAI
onboarding.subtitle: Your AI-Powered Mystical Guide
onboarding.intro: Discover the ancient wisdom of Tarot through modern AI technology. Get personalized readings, track your spiritual journey, and unlock deep insights.
onboarding.howItWorksDesc: Chat with our ArcanaAI, ask questions about love, career, or life path. Our AI interprets traditional Tarot wisdom for modern guidance.
onboarding.everythingYouNeed: Everything You Need for Your Journey
onboarding.chooseYourPathDesc: Select from multiple deck styles and reading spreads. Each card drawn is personalized for your unique energy and question.
onboarding.trackGrowthDesc: Keep a record of your readings, insights, and spiritual journey. Watch patterns emerge and your intuition strengthen over time.
onboarding.buildCommunityDesc: Share meaningful readings with friends and discover how others interpret the cards. Create your own tarot community.
onboarding.joinThousands: Join thousands who have discovered clarity, guidance, and wisdom through our AI Tarot readings.
onboarding.tourWelcome: Welcome to ArcanaAI! Let's take a quick tour to get you started.
onboarding.personalGrowthDesc: Track your spiritual journey with detailed analytics
onboarding.deepWisdomDesc: Access centuries of tarot knowledge through modern AI
onboarding.aiChatReadingsDesc: Natural conversations with our ArcanaAI for personalized guidance
onboarding.multipleDecksDesc: Choose from various tarot decks including Rider-Waite, Marseille, and more
onboarding.readingJournalDesc: Keep track of your readings and watch patterns emerge over time
onboarding.shareInsightsDesc: Share meaningful readings with friends and build your community
onboarding.premiumFeaturesDesc: Unlock unlimited readings, advanced spreads, and detailed analytics
onboarding.readingHistoryDesc: Keep track of all your readings
onboarding.patternRecognitionDesc: Discover recurring themes in your life
onboarding.personalAnalyticsDesc: Track your spiritual growth over time
onboarding.shareReadingsDesc: Create shareable links for meaningful readings you want to discuss with friends
onboarding.buildCommunityShortDesc: Connect with others on similar spiritual journeys and share insights
onboarding.timeToBegin: Time to Begin Your First Reading
onboarding.youNowKnow: You now know everything you need to start your mystical journey. Ready to get your first AI-powered tarot reading?
onboarding.welcomeAboard: Welcome aboard! You're ready to start!

spread.customDrawDesc: Choose your own number of cards (1-10)
